userText: My opinion on learn English is the phrasis is most important.
corrected: In my opinion, phrases are the most important part of learning English.

issues.note: 'My opinion on learn English is...' is unnatural; use 'In my opinion, ...'

suggestions: Use 'In my opinion, ...' as a sentence starter. After a preposition, use the -ing form. 'The most important' always needs 'the'.
